title: ilex suber
intro: Ilex suber, also known as the tree heath or tree holly, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ilex suber include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and act as a natural diuretic, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. Ilex suber can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
